user_message:
Run an Economic Coherence & Financial Integrity assessment for the following entity.

ENTITY:
- Legal name: Renault SA
- Country / jurisdiction: France
- Registry identifier (SIREN / BCE / Companies House / LEI / other): 441639465
- Declared legal form (if known): SA cotée
- Declared activity / NAF / NACE (if known): Construction automobile

OPTIONAL CONTEXT:
- Additional context provided by the requester: Wrapper smoke test
- Analysis date (override "today" if needed): 2026-04-27

Apply the methodology defined in your system instructions and return JSON only.

risk_assessment.summary: Renault SA (SIREN 441639465) is a publicly listed French automotive company with full financial visibility through official publications of annual results, integrated reports, and audited financial statements up to 2025. Recent financial performance shows solid growth, record operating profit, and revenue increases as per company disclosures. Credit ratings affirmed at Ba1 with no insolvency or transparency issues identified. No anomalies, offshore structures, or regulatory proceedings detected in available sources.
